perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white dress and beige bucket hat stands in front of a freezer at a Costco warehouse, pointing excitedly at boxes of 'Chen Pin' pork dumplings. She opens the freezer door and struggles slightly to lift a large red box. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the box is opened to reveal multiple clear plastic bags filled with frozen dumplings. Close-ups show hands pointing at the size and quantity of the dumplings. (3) A sequence shows the dumplings being boiled in a pot and then scooped out using a metal strainer. (4) The woman and a friend are seated at a dining table with a plate of cooked dumplings. They use chopsticks to dip the dumplings in sauce and take bites while talking directly to the camera with expressive gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone about a 'super cheap' find at Costco. (2) Sound of a heavy freezer door opening and closing, followed by the rustling of a cardboard box being moved. (3) The female narrator continues, explaining the price breakdown (less than 2 yuan per piece) and the total count (180 pieces). (4) Bubbling sounds of boiling water and the clinking of a metal strainer against a pot. (5) Two female voices engage in a dialogue, describing the taste, the crunchiness of the cabbage, and the texture of the pork filling. They conclude with enthusiastic positive feedback.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White subtitles at the bottom track the spoken dialogue regarding the price and taste of the dumplings. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. (3) Hook Text: '史上最便宜！好吃嗎？' (Cheapest ever! Is it good?), '一顆不用2元 豬肉水餃' (Less than 2 yuan per pork dumpling), and '太便宜了吧！！' (Too cheap!!) appear in large yellow and blue fonts to emphasize the value. (4) Functional Text: '180顆 329元' (180 pieces for 329 yuan) and '煮水餃中' (Boiling dumplings) appear during the respective phases.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail location -> Unboxing/Preparation -> Controlled tasting and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in bucket hat, 1 friend appearing during the tasting segment
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a beige bucket hat and a white puff-sleeve dress with a floral pattern on the lower half.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a commercial warehouse freezer aisle (Costco) with shelves full of frozen food, then moves to a brightly lit modern kitchen and dining area with household appliances and a dining table.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting and natural-looking studio lights.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a positive review of a cost-effective bulk food product (Chen Pin Pork Dumplings) found at Costco, focusing on its extreme affordability (less than 2 yuan per dumpling) and surprising quality given the price point.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed mention of price, quantity, and brand name 'Chen Pin' with a clear call to check it out at Costco.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with bold, colorful text overlays typical of lifestyle vlogs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses price-based shock value ('Less than 2 yuan') as a hook to engage budget-conscious viewers.
